title: Recursive Fractal Generation
scenario: Create a prompt for an LLM to generate a recursive fractal using a given recursive formula. The prompt should take the formula as input and output a high-quality, visually appealing fractal image as a PNG file. The fractal should have a minimum resolution of 800x800 pixels.
constraints: Must include a clear explanation of the recursive formula

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt adheres to the word limit and includes a clear explanation of the recursive formula.
Check if the generated fractal image has high quality and meets the resolution requirement.
Check if the recursive formula is correctly implemented and produces the expected fractal pattern.
